title: Plan Tracer Bullets
description: Tracer bullet decomposition output from the decompose-tracer-bullets agent

id.description: Unique identifier for this tracer bullet

goal.description: What this tracer bullet delivers when complete

verification.description: How to verify this tracer bullet works end-to-end

depends_on.description: TB ids that must be complete before this one

tasks_summary.description: High-level task descriptions (details come from sequence-tasks agent)

includes_spike.description: Whether this TB includes a spike task

spike_description.description: What the spike needs to answer (if includes_spike is true)

tracer_bullets.description: Ordered list of tracer bullets decomposed from requirements
